parameters.query:
SELECT 
    loja,
    nome_vendedor,
    valor_total_vendido,
    quantidade_vendas,
    meta_top1_diaria
FROM marialima_vw_ai_performance_diaria
WHERE data_venda = current_date - interval '1 day'
ORDER BY loja, valor_total_vendido DESC;

SELECT 
    loja,
    nome_vendedor,
    valor_total_vendido,
    quantidade_vendas,
    meta_minima_individual AS meta_minima,
    meta_top1_individual AS meta_top1,
    meta_top2_individual AS meta_top2,
    meta_master_individual AS meta_master
FROM marialima_vw_ai_performance_mensal
WHERE year_month = to_char(current_date, 'YYYY-MM')
ORDER BY loja, valor_total_vendido DESC;
